recommendations.title: The Boys in the Boat
recommendations.overview: The triumphant underdog story of the University of Washington men's rowing team, who stunned the world by competing at the 1936 Berlin Olympics.

recommendations.title: Good Night, and Good Luck.
recommendations.overview: The story of journalist Edward R. Murrow's stand against Senator Joseph McCarthy's anti-communist witch-hunts in the early 1950s.

recommendations.title: The Ides of March
recommendations.overview: Dirty tricks stand to soil an ambitious young press spokesman's idealism in a cutthroat presidential campaign where 'victory' is relative.

recommendations.title: Confessions of a Dangerous Mind
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Crime, Drama, Romance, Thriller, History
recommendations.overview: Television made him famous, but his biggest hits happened off screen. Television producer by day, CIA assassin by night, Chuck Barris was recruited by the CIA at the height of his TV career and trained to become a covert operative. Or so Barris said.

recommendations.title: Gravity
recommendations.overview: Dr Ryan Stone, an engineer on her first space mission, and Matt Kowalski, an astronaut on his final expedition, have to survive in space after they are hit by debris while spacewalking.

recommendations.title: The Tender Bar

recommendations.title: Solaris
recommendations.overview: A troubled psychologist is sent to investigate the crew of an isolated research station orbiting a bizarre planet.
